---
title: "Customer Documents Roadmap"
subtitle: "Authoring backlog for the customer-documents tree"
doc-type: planning
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
aspirational: true
---

::: {.callout-note}
This roadmap tracks authoring work in `docs/customer-documents/`. It is an
authoring backlog, not a delivery commitment. Priorities reflect the order in
which stubs are most useful to surface for customer-facing review.
:::

## Snapshot (as of 2026-05-10)

The snapshot below is the result of a tree audit, not an aspirational target.
"Stub" = file that is essentially frontmatter plus an "in preparation" callout
(typically ≤ 35 lines). "Authored" = substantive prose; "Partial" = real prose
but visibly incomplete.

### Sections originally in scope (Phase 1–7)

| Section | Files | Stub | Partial | Authored | Nav |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|
| `adapter-specs/` | 49 | 0 | 0 | 49 | ✅ |
| `validation-suites/adapters/` | — | 0 | 0 | full | ✅ |
| `executive-briefs/` | 6 | 0 | 1 | 5 | ✅ |
| `architecture-series/` | 6 | 5 | 0 | 1 | ✅ |
| `whitepapers/` | 7 | 0 | 0 | 7 | ✅ |
| `executive-governance-series/` | 10 | 0 | 0 | 10 | ✅ |
| `modernization-specs/` | 6 | 0 | 0 | 6 | ✅ |
| `validation-suites/domains/` | 6 | 0 | 0 | 6 | ✅ |
| `case-studies/` | 3 | 3 | 0 | 0 | ✅ |

**Open authoring backlog: 3 stubs** (the Phase 7 case studies). Down
from the 2026-04-23 baseline of 40 because Phases 1–6 have since
landed.

### Sections added since the original ROADMAP

These directories exist in the tree but were not in the 2026-04-23 snapshot.
They are out-of-scope for the original Phase 1–7 plan but tracked here so the
backlog reflects the whole `customer-documents/` surface.

| Section | Files | Index? | Notes |
|---|---:|:---:|---|
| `compliance/` | 15 | ✅ | Authored; cross-links to control catalogs |
| `modernization/` | 5 + nested | ✅ | Authored; modernization program narrative |
| `orgpath-narrative/` | 15 | ✅ | Authored |
| `platform/` | 3 | ✅ | Authored |
| `substrate/` | 7 | ✅ | Authored |

No active authoring backlog in these five sections — drift watch only.

## Phased delivery plan

### Phase 1 — Executive Briefs (1 page remaining)

**Status:** 4 of 5 briefs authored. Only `governance-os-overview` is partial
(23 lines — frontmatter + one paragraph + maturity note; missing the
structured body that the four sibling briefs share).

| # | Brief | Canon anchor | State | Effort |
|---:|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `governance-os-overview.qmd` | `src/uiao/canon/substrate-manifest.yaml` | **Partial — needs body** | S |
| 2 | `drift-engine-overview.qmd` | `docs/docs/16_DriftDetectionStandard.qmd` | ✅ Authored | — |
| 3 | `evidence-fabric-overview.qmd` | `docs/docs/15_ProvenanceProfile.qmd` | ✅ Authored | — |
| 4 | `zero-trust-overview.qmd` | `src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-008-zero-trust-identity.md` | ✅ Authored | — |
| 5 | `modernization-overview.qmd` | `06_ProgramVision.qmd` + `08_ModernizationTimeline.qmd` | ✅ Authored | — |

**Exit criteria:** all 5 briefs pass `metadata-validator`; each cites its canon
anchor in frontmatter; link-check clean. Currently blocked on item 1 only.

### Phase 2 — Architecture Series (5 pages)

**Why second:** explainers for the conceptual model. Customers who read an
Executive Brief and want depth click through to the Architecture Series next.
Each explainer is ~2–4 pages.

| # | Page | Canon anchor | State | Effort |
|---:|---|---|---|---|
| 6 | `six-plane-architecture.qmd` | `docs/docs/01_UnifiedArchitecture.qmd` | Stub | M |
| 7 | `drift-engine.qmd` | `docs/docs/16_DriftDetectionStandard.qmd` | Stub | M |
| 8 | `evidence-chain.qmd` | `docs/docs/15_ProvenanceProfile.qmd` | Stub | M |
| 9 | `three-layer-rule-model.qmd` | `src/uiao/rules/` | Stub | M |
| 10 | `boundary-impact-model.qmd` | **gap — see canon-anchor note** | Stub | L |
| — | `aodim-architecture.qmd` | `inbox/Posted/AODIM_Architecture_Document.docx` | ✅ Authored | — |

::: {.callout-warning}
**Canon-anchor gap (item 10).** The original ROADMAP cited
`docs/docs/authorization-boundary.qmd`, which does not exist in the tree.
Closest existing canon: `docs/docs/gcc-boundary-problem-statement.qmd`,
`docs/docs/gcc-boundary-solution-architecture.qmd`,
`docs/docs/drift-detection-boundary-amendment.qmd`. Resolve before authoring
item 10 — either re-anchor to one of these or file a new canon document under
the canon-change ADR process.
:::

### Phase 3 — Whitepapers (3 pages remaining)

**Why third:** long-form synthesis — requires the Executive Briefs and
Architecture Series to be in place so whitepapers can cite them rather than
repeat foundational material. Four whitepapers have already landed:
`ad-to-entraid-migration-problem.qmd`, `aodim-executive-whitepaper.qmd`,
`uiao-vs-native-tools.qmd`, plus the AODIM trio.

| # | Paper | Canon anchor | State | Effort |
|---:|---|---|---|---|
| 11 | `uiao-governance-os-whitepaper.qmd` | substrate manifest + unified architecture | Stub | L |
| 12 | `zero-trust-governance-whitepaper.qmd` | ADR-008 + ZT brief (already authored) | Stub | L |
| 13 | `modernization-governance-whitepaper.qmd` | Program Vision + Modernization Timeline | Stub | L |
| 14 | `scubagear-integration-whitepaper.qmd` | `src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml` (ScubaGear) | Stub | M |

### Phase 4 — Executive Governance Series (9 chapters)

**Structure resolved.** The canonical source is
`executive-governance-series/governance-os-canonical-suite.qmd` (~2,865 lines,
authored). The customer-facing presentation is the nine `chNN-*/index.qmd`
files (each ~35-line stub today). Authoring task: extract and adapt content
from the canonical suite into each chapter index, preserving canon-source
provenance.

| # | Chapter | State | Effort |
|---:|---|---|---|
| 15 | `ch01-why-governance-fails/` | Stub | L |
| 16 | `ch02-compliance-paradox/` | Stub | L |
| 17 | `ch03-drift-as-primary-threat/` | Stub | L |
| 18 | `ch04-deterministic-governance/` | Stub | L |
| 19 | `ch05-adapter-model/` | Stub | L |
| 20 | `ch06-evidence-over-attestation/` | Stub | L |
| 21 | `ch07-operational-tempo/` | Stub | L |
| 22 | `ch08-governance-at-scale/` | Stub | L |
| 23 | `ch09-governance-operating-system/` | Stub | L |

Publish incrementally rather than big-bang.

### Phase 5 — Modernization Technical Specifications (6 pages)

**Why fifth:** cross-adapter domain specs. Each MTS is derived from the
adapter registry plus domain-specific canon. Deliver alongside Phase 6 so
every MTS has a paired MVS. The original ROADMAP listed a generic template
(`_template/mts-generic-template.md`); that file does not exist in the tree.
Either author the template first as item 24, or drop it and inline the
template into the first domain (identity).

| # | Domain | Path | State | Effort |
|---:|---|---|---|---|
| 24 | (template) | _to be decided_ | Missing | S |
| 25 | identity | `modernization-specs/identity/identity.qmd` | Stub | M |
| 26 | cloud | `modernization-specs/cloud/cloud.qmd` | Stub | M |
| 27 | zero-trust | `modernization-specs/zero-trust/zero-trust.qmd` | Stub | M |
| 28 | telemetry | `modernization-specs/telemetry/telemetry.qmd` | Stub | M |
| 29 | sase | `modernization-specs/sase/sase.qmd` | Stub | M |
| 30 | sdwan | `modernization-specs/sdwan/sdwan.qmd` | Stub | M |

### Phase 6 — Modernization Validation Suites (6 pages)

Paired with Phase 5. Same domain order: identity → cloud → zero-trust →
telemetry → sase → sdwan. Files at
`validation-suites/domains/<domain>/<domain>.qmd`, all stubs.

### Phase 7 — Case Studies (3 pages)

**Why last:** require shipped or late-stage-TARGET capability to make credible
claims. Draft from real engagement material when available.

| # | Study | State | Effort |
|---:|---|---|---|
| 38 | `identity-modernization-case-study.qmd` | Stub | L |
| 39 | `cloud-boundary-case-study.qmd` | Stub | L |
| 40 | `federal-modernization-case-study.qmd` | Stub | L |

## Authoring contract

Every new customer-document page must:

1. Carry canonical YAML frontmatter (`metadata-validator` CI gate).
2. Cite its `canon-source` in frontmatter.
3. Include an `aspirational: true` flag if the described capability is TARGET
   or DESIGN-ONLY per [Substrate Status](../docs/substrate-status.html).
4. Pass `link-check` (no broken internal or external references).
5. Land in the same PR as any required updates to the parent section's
   `index.qmd` — remove the slug from any "Planned pages" table once authored.

## Effort key

- **S** — ≤ 1 page of prose; ~half a day.
- **M** — 2–4 pages; 1–2 days.
- **L** — ≥ 5 pages or requires new diagrams / canon crosswalk; ≥ 3 days.

## Tracking

File individual GitHub issues per page under label
`customer-docs-authoring`, one phase at a time. Close when the page is merged
into `main` and the corresponding `Planned pages` row is removed from the
section index.

_(Last reviewed 2026-05-10 — re-baselined against tree audit; corrects
2026-04-23 snapshot which understated authored content in `executive-briefs/`
and `whitepapers/` and missed the `executive-governance-series/chNN-*/`
chapter directories and five out-of-scope sections. Canon-anchor gap for
`boundary-impact-model.qmd` flagged for resolution before Phase 2 #10.)_
